mapper.insert: insert into equipment(supermarket_id, serial_number, contact_phone, money, status, sort, remark,online_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{data.supermarketId}, #{data.serialNumber}, #{data.contactPhone}, #{data.money}, #{data.status}, #{data.sort}, #{data.remark}, #{data.onlineStatus},now(), now())
mapper.update:
update equipment
supermarket_id = #{data.supermarketId},
serial_number = #{data.serialNumber},
contact_phone = #{data.contactPhone},
money = #{data.money},
status = #{data.status},
sort = #{data.sort},
remark = #{data.remark},
update_time = now(),
where id = #{data.id}

update equipment set delete_time = now() where id in
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM equipment WHERE serial_number = #{serialNumber} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT * FROM equipment WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT * FROM equipment WHERE supermarket_id = #{supermarketId} AND status = 1 AND delete_time IS NULL ORDER BY sort DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT e.id AS equipment_id, e.serial_number, e.supermarket_id AS business_circle_id, s.name AS business_circle_name, 6 AS slot_total, COALESCE(SUM(d.slot_count), 0) AS used_count, GREATEST(6 - COALESCE(SUM(d.slot_count), 0), 0) AS remaining_count, COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT o.shop_name ORDER BY o.shop_name SEPARATOR '、'), '') AS merchant_names FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN supermarket_info s ON s.id = e.supermarket_id AND s.delete_time IS NULL LEFT JOIN screen_rental_detail d ON d.equipment_id = e.id AND d.rental_year = #{year} AND d.rental_month = #{month} AND d.status IN (0, 1, 2) LEFT JOIN screen_rental_order o ON o.id = d.order_id AND o.status IN (0, 1, 2)
e.delete_time IS NULL
AND e.serial_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.serialNumber}, '%')
AND e.supermarket_id = #{param.businessCircleId}
GROUP BY e.id, e.serial_number, e.supermarket_id, s.name ORDER BY MAX(e.sort) DESC, MAX(e.create_time) DESC
SELECT * FROM equipment WHERE online_status = 0 AND app_require_time <= #{checkTime} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.update:
update equipment
supermarket_id = #{data.supermarketId},
serial_number = #{data.serialNumber},
contact_phone = #{data.contactPhone},
money = #{data.money},
status = #{data.status},
online_status = #{data.onlineStatus},
sort = #{data.sort},
remark = #{data.remark},
version_id = #{data.versionId},
version_serial_number = #{data.versionSerialNumber},
`release` = #{data.release},
app_require_time = #{data.appRequireTime},
where id = #{data.id}
